name: 14" Artificial Leaves in Square Wall Planter - Threshold™
description:
Elevate your indoor decor in eye-catching style with this Artificial Leaves in Square Wall Planter from Threshold™. This hanging wall planter features lush green artificial leaves arranged together inside an iron container with faux soil filler for quick and easy display. Hang the planter anywhere in your home and it will reward you with its versatile, beautiful look.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
